recommendations.title: Camp Rock
recommendations.genres: Music, Comedy, Drama, Romance, Family, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: When Mitchie gets a chance to attend Camp Rock, her life takes an unpredictable twist, and she learns just how important it is to be true to yourself.

recommendations.title: I Still Believe
recommendations.overview: The true-life story of Christian music star Jeremy Camp and his journey of love and loss that looks to prove there is always hope.

recommendations.title: Tini: The New Life of Violetta
recommendations.overview: A teen star ventures out to the Italian countryside for a summer and emerges a new artist.

recommendations.title: Daddy Day Camp
recommendations.overview: Seeking to offer his son the satisfying summer camp experience that eluded him as a child, the operator of a neighborhood daycare center opens his own camp, only to face financial hardship and stiff competition from a rival camp.

recommendations.title: Jesus Camp
recommendations.overview: Jesus Camp is a Christian summer camp where children hone their "prophetic gifts" and are schooled in how to "take back America for Christ". The film is a first-ever look into an intense training ground that recruits born-again Christian children to

recommendations.title: Summerland
recommendations.overview: A woman during the Second World War opens her heart to an evacuee after initially resolving to be rid of him.

recommendations.title: Dirty Kids
recommendations.overview: French seniors enroll in summer camp.

recommendations.title: Camp Rock 2: The Final Jam
recommendations.overview: Mitchie can't wait to go back to Camp Rock and spend the summer making new music with her friends and superstar Shane Gray. But the slick new camp across the lake, Camp Star, has drummed up some serious competition – featuring newcomers Luke and Dana

recommendations.title: The Anthem of the Heart
recommendations.overview: A young girl had her voice magically taken away so that she would never hurt people with it, but her outlook changes when she encounters music and friendship. Will Naruse be able to convey the anthem of her heart?

recommendations.title: Our Father
recommendations.overview: Two young boys, Valerio and Christian, form a powerful friendship over the summer.
